rows.title: Author once, generate everything
rows.body: A single canonical source per component emits SDC, React, Vue, and Storybook — no hand-porting, no drift.

rows.title: Ship no CSS
rows.body: Markup is tokenized Tailwind bound to CSS-variable design tokens. Swap a value set to re-skin everything.

rows.title: Built for agents
rows.body: Rich per-component metadata makes the catalog explorable so an agent can pick the right component fast.
